description: change MLP from 3x to 2x hidden dimension expansion
hypothesis: 4x→3x barely helped; 2x may give more optimizer steps at the cost of less MLP capacity
next_move: if better, the trend is real; if worse, 3x is the sweet spot

description: change n_kv_head from num_heads (2) to 1 in build_model_config
hypothesis: single shared KV head saves parameters and compute; may allow more steps and better generalization
next_move: if better, MQA works well for the short-run regime; if worse, 2 KV heads is needed

description: change RoPE base frequency from 10000 to 2000
hypothesis: base=10000 is standard for long-context models; with MAX_SEQ_LEN=2048 a lower base may better concentrate position information in the useful range
next_move: if better, try 500; if worse, 10000 is fine for this context length

commit_message: Retry TOTAL_BATCH_SIZE=2^15 on tuned depth-2 model
description: halve TOTAL_BATCH_SIZE from 2^16 to 2^15, eliminating gradient accumulation and doubling optimizer steps
hypothesis: was bad on depth-4 baseline; with tuned depth-2 and 3x MLP the extra steps may now outweigh the noisier gradients
next_move: if still worse, 2^16 is correct for this model size; if better, the step-count advantage dominates

commit_message: Raise MATRIX_LR to 0.04 on 3x MLP model
description: retry MATRIX_LR=0.04 on the 3x MLP checkpoint (previously tested on 4x MLP)
hypothesis: 3x MLP changes forward dynamics; Muon may now tolerate a slightly higher LR
next_move: if better, the MLP change shifted the optimal MATRIX_LR; if worse, 0.035 is still correct

replacements.old: MATRIX_LR = 0.035       # learning rate for matrix parameters (Muon)
replacements.new: MATRIX_LR = 0.040       # learning rate for matrix parameters (Muon)

description: change MLP from 3x to 5x hidden dimension expansion
hypothesis: depth-2 has only 2 blocks; a wider MLP may compensate for less depth with more per-layer capacity
next_move: if better, more capacity per block wins over compute savings; try 6x
